name: Tuscan Tuna Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Can (13 oz) white tuna, packed in water, drained
1 Can (8 oz) dark red kidney beans, rinsed and drained
1/2 cup sliced green onions and tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tuna, beans, tomato, olives, and onions in a large bowl.
2. In a small bowl, combine Pace Picante Sauce, dressing, and basil, mixing well; add to tuna mixture. Mix lightly.
3. Chill.
4. Arrange shredded spinach leaves on a serving plate.
5. Top with the tuna mixture.
6. Serve with additional Pace Picante Sauce.
